examples.name: Hello World
examples.description: Logs \"Hello, World!\" to the console using the log primitive.

examples.name: Basic Arithmetic
examples.description: Computes (3 + 4) * 2 = 14 using add and multiply primitives.

examples.name: Fibonacci
examples.description: Computes the 10th Fibonacci number using a recursive method with two cases (base and recursive).

examples.name: Factorial
examples.description: Computes 5! = 120 using a recursive method with base case (n <= 1) and recursive case.

examples.name: Quadratic Formula
examples.description: Solves ax^2 + bx + c = 0 for a=1, b=-3, c=2, producing roots x=2 and x=1.

examples.name: Temperature Converter
examples.description: Temperature class converts Celsius to Fahrenheit using OOP methods. Result: \"212°F\".

examples.name: Drawing Shapes
examples.description: Creates a red rectangle and a blue oval on a 400x300 canvas.

examples.name: Bouncing Ball
examples.description: Ball class with position, velocity, and render method. Creates a ball and renders one frame on canvas.

examples.name: String Reverse
examples.description: Reverses the string \"Hello\" and logs the result.

examples.name: Word Count
examples.description: Counts the words in a sentence by splitting on spaces and taking the list length.

examples.name: List Operations
examples.description: Creates lists, appends them, sorts the result, and retrieves the first item.

examples.name: Dictionary Phonebook
examples.description: Contact class with display method. Creates contacts, displays each with name and phone number.

examples.name: Todo List
examples.description: TodoItem class with toggle and display methods. Creates items, toggles one, displays all.

examples.name: Counter
examples.description: Creates a Counter object, increments it three times, and reads the count. Result: 3.

examples.name: Bank Account
examples.description: Creates a BankAccount, sets the owner, deposits twice, and reads the balance. Result: 150.

examples.name: Shapes (Inheritance)
examples.description: Shape and Circle classes with inheritance. Dynamic dispatch calls Circle's describe override. Result: \"circle r=5\".

examples.name: Point (Init)
examples.description: Point class with init constructor and distance-squared method. Result: 25.

examples.name: Pong
examples.description: Playable pong with a bouncing ball. Left paddle follows the pointer; right paddle tracks the ball. Uses a game loop to animate continuously.

examples.name: Breakout
examples.description: Playable breakout with a bouncing ball and pointer-controlled paddle. Ball bounces off walls and the paddle area. Uses a game loop for continuous animation.

examples.name: Snake
examples.description: Animated snake that moves continuously across the screen with a food target. The green snake head bounces off walls while the red food stays fixed. Uses a game loop.

examples.name: Asteroid Dodge
examples.description: Dodge falling rocks by moving the ship with the pointer. The rock falls from the top and wraps back when it reaches the bottom. Uses a game loop for animation.

examples.name: Email Validator
examples.description: Checks if a string contains '@' to perform basic email validation.

examples.name: Password Strength
examples.description: Checks password length and logs whether it meets the minimum requirement of 8 characters.

examples.name: Shopping Cart
examples.description: Product and Cart classes. Adds products to a cart and reads the total. Result: 35.

examples.name: Validator
examples.description: Validator class chains validation checks on a value. Result: false (too short).

examples.name: HTTP GET
examples.description: Stub: HTTP networking primitives are not yet available. Logs a placeholder message.

examples.name: JSON Parse
examples.description: Stub: JSON parsing primitives are not yet available. Logs a placeholder message.

examples.name: Math: Fibonacci
examples.description: Compute the 10th Fibonacci number using the math library.

examples.name: Math: Prime Check
examples.description: Check if a number is prime using the math library.

examples.name: Crypto: SHA-256 Hash
examples.description: Compute the SHA-256 hash of a string using the crypto library.

examples.name: Crypto: UUID Generator
examples.description: Generate a random UUID using the crypto library.

examples.name: FileIO: Write and Read
examples.description: Write a text file to /tmp then read it back using the fileio library.

examples.name: Locale: System Info
examples.description: Display the current locale language, country, and timezone.

examples.name: Sound: Play Sine Tone
examples.description: Generate and play a 440Hz sine tone for 1 second using the sound library.

examples.name: Bitmap: Red Square
examples.description: Create a 100x100 bitmap, fill it red, and draw a white rectangle using the bitmap library.
